_coverage_note: JNTUK Engineering colleges are now comprehensive: Constituent + Autonomous-Private + regular non-autonomous affiliated (Private) colleges, sourced from the official DAA portal (constituent.php, the autonomous list, and affiliatedColleges.php). Covers East Godavari, Guntur, Krishna, Prakasam and West Godavari districts. Still JNTUK-only -- JNTUH, JNTUA and JNTUGV are not started. Deliberately EXCLUDES Srikakulam/Visakhapatnam/Vizianagaram (SKL/VSP/VZM) colleges that still appear on the JNTUK portal but are stale post-2022 JNTU-GV territory (e.g. University College of Engineering Vizianagaram is now a JNTU-GV constituent per jntugvcev.edu.in); those need genuine JNTU-GV-specific sourcing, NOT this JNTUK portal, and must not be re-derived from here. branches_offered and per-college city are still not sourced per-college.
